variants: Umaeirah Binwary is an accomplished professional employed by Bluefin Robotics Collective, where she communicates using the Hindi alphabet. She was born in Meadowforge Hollow and later attended Osprey Heights College for her higher education. In addition to her work at Bluefin, Umaeirah actively participates as a Liaison to Mariner Food Collective, reinforcing her commitment to community service and engagement.
